basic_details.job_title: ESIC Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for 49 Senior Resident, Specialist and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: Employees State Insurance Corporation (ESIC) has released the official Senior Resident / Specialist / Super Specialist Recruitment 2026 Notification under Advt No. 04/2026 at the official website. A total of 49 vacancies have been announced under the ESIC Senior Resident / Specialist / Super Specialist Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates with PG Degree / Diploma in concerned specialty, DM/M.Ch for Super Specialist, or MBBS with 2 years experience can attend the Walk-in Interview on 21 May 2026. The maximum age limit is 69 years. Candidates can check the official notification PDF, eligibility

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 69 years for all posts. Age relaxation for SC/ST/OBC/PH as per rules.

qualification.education_qualification: PG Degree or Diploma in concerned specialty, DM/M.Ch for Super Specialist, MBBS with 2 years experience for GDMO Senior Resident
qualification.details: Senior Resident (Anaesthesia, Chest/Pulmonary Medicine, Medicine, Obs. & Gynae, Orthopaedics, Paediatrics, Radiology, Surgery, ICU, EYE, ENT): PG Degree or Diploma in the concerned specialty from a recognized university. Full Time/Part Time Specialist (Chest/Pulmonary Medicine, Medicine, Obs. & Gynae, Paediatrics, Radiology, Surgery, Psychiatry, ICU, Accidental & E, Skin): PG Degree or Diploma in the concerned specialty from a recognized university with 3 years of experience after PG Degree or 5 years post-diploma. Part Time/Full Time Super Specialist (Cardiology): Post-Graduation qualification in the concerned specialty with DM/M.Ch in the concerned Super Specialty. Senior Resident (Against GDMO): PG Degree/Diploma or MBBS Degree from a recognized university with at least 2 years of working experience.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Full Time/Part Time Specialist - Chest/Pulmonary Medicine
Full Time/Part Time Specialist - Obs. & Gynae
Full Time/Part Time Specialist - Accidental & E
Part Time/Full Time Super Specialist - Cardiology

salary_details.pay_scale: As per Central Government rules adopted by ESIC
salary_details.details: Senior Resident / Specialist: As per Central Government rules adopted by ESIC. Super Specialist: Consolidated Remuneration as per ESIC Hqrs guidelines.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for ESIC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the ESIC Senior Resident / Specialist / Super Specialist posts is scheduled for 21 May 2026. Candidates should report at the venue within the specified reporting time.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in the ESIC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 49 vacancies announced for the posts of Senior Resident, Specialist, and Super Specialist in the Employees State Insurance Corporation (ESIC) Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this ESIC recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this ESIC recruitment is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview directly at the specified venue and time.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for the ESIC posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all the posts in this ESIC recruitment is 69 years. Age relaxation is applicable for reserved categories as per government rules.

faq.question: Q5. What is the educational qualification required for the Senior Resident posts?
faq.answer: For Senior Resident posts, candidates need to have a PG Degree or Diploma in the concerned specialty. For Senior Resident (Against GDMO), an MBBS Degree with at least 2 years of working experience is also accepted.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the ESIC posts?
faq.answer: The salary for Senior Resident and Specialist posts will be as per Central Government rules adopted by ESIC. For Super Specialist posts, a consolidated remuneration as per ESIC Hqrs guidelines will be provided.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for ESIC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Yes, a security deposit of Rs. 50000/- is required from the selected candidate. No other application fee is mentioned for attending the walk-in interview.

faq.question: Q8. Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted at ESIC Hospital, Baddi, Himachal Pradesh, PIN 173205.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry all original documents, including ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if applicable), and category certificates (if applicable), along with one set of self-attested photocopies.

faq.question: Q10. What is the reporting time for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: The reporting time for the walk-in interview is between 09:00 AM and 11:00 AM on 21 May 2026.

faq.question: What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for ESIC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the ESIC Senior Resident / Specialist / Super Specialist posts is scheduled for 21 May 2026. Candidates should report at the venue within the specified reporting time.
